name: Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II
business: Pyrophyte Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has not engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date. It is a shell company with nominal assets consisting almost entirely of cash.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry and in any geographic region but expect to focus on targets in the energy sector.
